fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the profile questionnaire.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the profile questionnaire.

fields.name: Contact Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of contact you want to use this profile questionnaire for.

fields.name: Business Relation Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the business relation to which the profile questionnaire applies.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority you give to the profile questionnaire and where it should be displayed on the lines of the Contact Card. There are five options:
